channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Deepfake scammers are hijacking TikTok’s wellness craze to sell dubious health products
item.description: By now, most people know not to trust everything they see on TikTok. But scams on the platform are becoming increasingly sophisticated, thanks to deepfake technology.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: JFrog unveils JFrog ML for MLOps
item.description: JFrog has released JFrog ML, an MLOps solution designed to bring devops best practices to building, deploying, managing, and monitoring AI/ML workflows.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Brother denies claims it locked down third-party printer ink cartridges via forced firmware updates
item.description: Some users are reporting print quality issues with third-party ink issues, but Brother says it has nothing to do with it.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Spotify is leaning hard into video podcasts. Here’s how creators are adapting
item.description: Spotify just opened up a new stream of revenue for podcasters. That is, if they’re uploading video. What was once an audio-first medium, podcasting is now increasingly filmed and produced. That started on YouTube, which is now racking up one billion podcast viewers a month.
item.dc:creator: Henry Chandonnet, Fast Company

item.title: AMD might go for Nvidia’s jugular in Q2 with a faster RX 9070 ‘Extreme’ GPU that could leave the RTX 5070 Ti in the dust
item.description: If AMD has Nvidia on the ropes now, rumored RX 9070 XTX model that’s faster than the RTX 5070 Ti could be a knockout blow.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: New benchmark suggests Apple's M3 Ultra may not be much faster than the M4 Max - only a minor uplift in multi-core performance
item.description: Apple's latest Mac Studio will use the new M3 Ultra and M4 Max, but a new benchmark suggests the former will only be slightly faster in some CPU processes.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Anthropic Upgrades Console to Promote Collaboration and AI Effectiveness
item.description: Anthropic has upgraded its Console, introducing new features to promote collaboration among developers and improve the effectiveness of AI in enterprise applications.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Severance season 2 episode 8 just revealed four big details about Harmony Cobel's past – and spawned two new theories about Cold Harbor and Kier Eagan
item.description: The eighth episode of Severance season 2 reveals plenty about Harmony Cobel and her history with Lumon.
item.dc:creator: tom.power@futurenet.com (Tom Power), TechRadar

item.title: 8 obstacles women still face when seeking a leadership role in IT
item.description: If you are a tech leader, you might encourage your daughter to follow your path, imagining a journey, like yours, with challenges that can be overcome with hard work. But if you are a man — especially a white man — you are likely unaware of the massive obstacles she will face that you didn’t.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Why weird JD Vance memes have taken over the internet
item.description: Ironically enough, a divisive moment in the Oval Office last weekend seems to have brought the entire internet together.
item.dc:creator: Joe Berkowitz, Fast Company

item.title: Alibaba says its new AI model rivals DeepSeeks’s R-1, OpenAI’s o1
item.description: Alibaba Cloud on Thursday launched QwQ-32B, a compact reasoning model built on its latest large language model (LLM), Qwen2.5-32b, one it says delivers performance comparable to other large cutting edge models, including Chinese rival DeepSeek and OpenAI’s o1, with only 32 billion parameters.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Trump signs executive order to establish government bitcoin reserve
item.description: President Donald Trump has signed an executive order establishing a government reserve of bitcoin, a key marker in the cryptocurrency’s journey towards possible mainstream acceptance.
item.dc:creator: Alan Suderman, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Albania shuts down TikTok for a year amid concerns over violence among children
item.description: TIRANA, Albania (AP) — The Albanian Cabinet decided on Thursday to shut down TikTok for 12 months, blaming the popular video-sharing platform for inciting violence and bullying, especially among children.
item.dc:creator: LLAZAR SEMINI, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: HPE cuts 2,500 jobs, expects Juniper buy to close year-end ’25, faces tariff issues
item.description: Despite a mostly positive revenue report for the first quarter of its fiscal 2025, HPE executives detailed a number of challenges the company will face in the coming months, including layoffs, a court case over its proposed buy of Juniper Networks, and the U.S. government’s tariff plan.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Democrats ask for investigation into whether Musk is using government position to influence X advertisers
item.description: Democratic senators are asking the Department of Justice (DOJ) to investigate whether tech billionaire Elon Musk, a senior adviser to President Trump, is leveraging his government position to pressure advertisers into spending more on his social media platform, X.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, The Hill

item.title: The Senate Takes Aim at Debanking: A New Era for Crypto and Banking?
item.description: Senate Banking Committee Chair Tim Scott (R-S.C.) unveils legislation targeting debanking, a practice that has unfairly targeted the cryptocurrency industry.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Monarch butterflies wintering in Mexico rebound this year
item.description: The number of monarch butterflies wintering in the mountains west of Mexico City, rebounded this year, doubling the area they covered in 2024 despite the stresses of climate change.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: With new division, AWS bets big on agentic AI automation
item.description: Amazon Web Services customers can expect to hear a lot more about agentic AI in future with the news that the company is setting up a dedicated unit to promote the technology on its platform. The division will be headed by Swami Sivasubramanian, until now Amazon’s VP of AI and data services.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Utah becomes the first state to pass legislation requiring app stores to verify ages
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) — Utah on Wednesday became the first state to pass legislation requiring app stores to verify users’ ages and get parental consent for minors to download apps to their devices. The bill headed to the desk of Gov.
item.dc:creator: HANNAH SCHOENBAUM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Majority of voters don't want government to make decisions using AI: Poll
item.description: A majority of U.S. voters do not want the government using artificial intelligence (AI) to make decisions, according to a new poll from Americans for Responsible Innovation (ARI) shared first with The Hill.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Walk through your future home or business space before construction starts
item.description: Lifesize Plans offers immersive walk-throughs that allow customers the opportunity to tour a home's design before construction actually begins.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: GOP lawmakers balk at Trump’s call to repeal CHIPS Act
item.description: Republican lawmakers on Wednesday said President Trump’s call for Congress to “get rid of” the 2022 CHIPS and Science Act, which provided $52 billion for the domestic semiconductor manufacturing industry, is dead on arrival on Capitol Hill.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, The Hill

item.title: Asymmetric AI warfare in the era of cheap intelligence
item.description: Artificial intelligence innovation is at the forefront of this advancement and presents the necessity to detect emerging threats. The post Asymmetric AI warfare in the era of cheap intelligence first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: Judge denies Elon Musk's request to block OpenAI for-profit conversion but welcomes trial
item.description: OAKLAND, Calif. (AP) — A federal judge has denied Elon Musk's request for a court order blocking OpenAI from converting itself to a for-profit company but said she could expedite a trial to consider Musk's claims against the ChatGPT maker and its CEO. U.S.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN and BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: UK watchdog drops competition review of Microsoft's OpenAI deal
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Britain's competition watchdog said Wednesday it has dropped its review of Microsoft's partnership with OpenAI, saying it's satisfied that the deal doesn't need a closer investigation under the country's merger rules.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: AI pioneers who channeled 'hedonistic' machines win computer science's top prize
item.description: Teaching machines in the way that animal trainers mold the behavior of dogs or horses has been an important method for developing artificial intelligence and one that was recognized Wednesday with the top computer science award.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Reddit co-founder Alexis Ohanian joins bid to acquire TikTok
item.description: Reddit co-founder Alexis Ohanian has joined billionaire Frank McCourt’s bid to acquire TikTok as a strategic adviser.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Enabling this phone setting reduces anxiety, Gen Z says
item.description: It can create "a buffer against unwanted communications and potential social pressures," a psychotherapist said.
item.dc:creator: Alix Martichoux, NewsNation

item.title: Extra cash with no catch? Spotting retiree job scams
item.description: Reports of task scams have significantly risen in the past four years, according to the Federal Trade Commission. Kurt the CyberGuy offers some red flags.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
